title: nematanthus wettsteinii
intro: Nematanthus wettsteinii, also known as the Wettstein's Nematanthus or Goldfish Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nematanthus wettsteinii include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
